import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Shield, Target, Compass, Users, MapPin } from 'lucide-react'; import PageHero from './PageHero'; const About = () => { return (
Institutional Ethos

Leadership Through
Academic Integrity.

"We do not merely educate; we prepare our learners for a life of responsible, high-impact contribution."

Alexandria High School is a public school serving our community from foundation to matriculation. As a Quintile 3 school, we provide no-fee education, ensuring that quality learning is accessible to all.

Alexandria High School
CBD, Alexandria
{[ { icon: Shield, title: "Integrity", desc: "The foundational pillar of every academic endeavor at Alexandria High." }, { icon: Target, title: "Rigour", desc: "A relentless commitment to intellectual discipline and self-mastery." }, { icon: Compass, title: "Vision", desc: "Understanding our historical position and our future responsibility." }, { icon: Users, title: "Solidarity", desc: "Forging unbreakable bonds between diverse communities." } ].map((pillar, i) => (

{pillar.title}

{pillar.desc}

 ))}
); }; export default About;

Standard Operations

Democratizing
Excellence.

Alexandria High School adheres to the official admission policies of the Eastern Cape Department of Education, ensuring fair access for all community learners.

{[ "No-Fee Public Funding", "CAPS Curriculum Depth", "Inclusive Learner Support", "Community Accountability" ].map((item, i) => (
{item}
))}

Enrollment
Framework.

Guidance

Inquiry
Support.

Our admissions team is dedicated to guiding you through every step of the enrollment process.

Secretariat Hub

+27 46 653 0126

alexandriahigh@telkomsa.net

); }; export default Admissions;

import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Calendar as CalendarIcon, Clock, MapPin, ChevronRight, Info, Download, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; import PageHero from './PageHero'; const Calendar = () => { const termDates = [ { term: 1, duration: '14 January ??? 27 March', weeks: 11, schoolDays: 53 }, { term: 2, duration: '08 April ??? 26 June', weeks: 12, schoolDays: 54 }, { term: 3, duration: '21 July ??? 23 September', weeks: 10, schoolDays: 46 }, { term: 4, duration: '06 October ??? 09 December', weeks: 10, schoolDays: 47 }, ]; const publicHolidays = [ { date: '01 January', name: "New Year's Day" }, { date: '21 March', name: 'Human Rights Day' }, { date: '03 April', name: 'Good Friday' }, { date: '06 April', name: 'Family Day' }, { date: '27 April', name: 'Freedom Day' }, { date: '01 May', name: "Workers' Day" }, { date: '15 June', name: 'Special School Holiday' }, { date: '16 June', name: 'Youth Day' }, { date: '09 August', name: "National Women's Day" }, { date: '24 September', name: 'Heritage Day' }, { date: '16 December', name: 'Day of Reconciliation' }, { date: '25 December', name: 'Christmas Day' }, ]; return (

Timeline.

{termDates.map((term, index) => (

{holiday.date} {holiday.name} #OffCampus

Total Instruction Weeks

    {[ "Teachers report on 12 January 2026.", "End of Term 4: 11 December 2026.", "Subject to DBE Gazetted changes." ].map((note, i) => (

); }; export default Calendar;

{/* Academic Core: Immersive Section */}
{/* Status Overlay */}
65.1%
Official Matric Pass 2023
Secondary Standard

Senior
High School.
Scholarly Dignity.

At Alexandria High School, our Senior Phase is governed by the NSC (CAPS) curriculum. We prioritize a disciplined environment where academic curiosity is met with structural support and community trust.

Academic Stewardship
Technical Stream Focus
{/* Specialized Tracks: Studio Grid */}
{[ { icon: , title: "ICT Awareness", desc: "Equipping senior learners with digital literacy and Awareness ICT4E protocols in partnership with local foundations." }, { icon: , title: "NSC Framework", desc: "Rigorous focus on core subjects for the National Senior Certificate, ensuring tertiary readiness." }, { icon: , title: "Vocational Path", desc: "Preparation for diverse professional futures including agriculture, commerce, and technical trades." } ].map((track, i) => (
{track.icon}

{track.title}

{track.desc}

))}
{/* Preparation Section: High Contrast */}
Career Guidance

Transition &
Impact.

We facilitate formal tertiary applications and vocational mentorship, bridging the gap between a no-fee rural public school education and global opportunity.

Admissions Portal Our Heritage

Academic Protocol

{[ { label: 'Matric Pass (Official)', val: '65.1%' }, { label: 'No-Fee Status', val: 'Quintile 3' }, { label: 'Assessment Policy', val: 'SBA 25%' } ].map((stat, i) => (
{stat.label} {stat.val}
))}
{/* Massive Decorative Typography */}
G12
); }; export default HighSchool;

import React from 'react'; import PageHero from './PageHero'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Smile, Layout, Heart, Lightbulb, Compass, Shield, ShieldCheck, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const PrimarySchool = () => { return (
{/* Introduction: Immersive Section */}
Foundation & Intermediate

Infinite
Potential.

At Alexandria High School, our primary years are dedicated to building a secure academic harbor. We prioritize the #DignityFirst standard, ensuring every child transitions from early literacy to adolescent leadership with confidence.

Secure Harbor

A disciplined and nurturing environment for holistic growth.

CAPS Readiness

Rigorous literacy and numeracy instruction aligned with national standards.
{/* Discovery Pillars: Studio Grid */}
{[ { icon: , title: "Active Literacy", desc: "Using local context and ICT tools to breathe life into the foundations of reading and arithmetic." }, { icon: , title: "Character Growth", desc: "Instilling values of respect and community service in our youngest Alexandria ambassadors." }, { icon: , title: "Equity First", desc: "A no-fee commitment that ensures every learner from our farming roots to our CBD has equal access." } ].map((pillar, i) => (
{pillar.icon}

{pillar.title}

{pillar.desc}

))}
{/* Atmosphere: High Contrast */}
Atmosphere

The Space
Between.

We bridge the gap between rural resilience and modern aspiration. Our playgrounds and classrooms are spaces of mutual dignity and discipline.

Start Enrollment
{[ { title: "Harmony", icon: , desc: "Structured play for physical and social development." }, { title: "ICT Literacy", icon: , desc: "Early introduction to digital tools as a life skill." }, { title: "Community", icon: , desc: "Fostering pride in our Alexandria heritage." }, { title: "Discipline", icon: , desc: "High standards of conduct and mutual respect." } ].map((item, i) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.desc}

))}
{/* Massive Decorative Typography */}
R7
); }; export default PrimarySchool;

Admissions Portal

Online
Application.

A streamlined, formal process for prospective learners to join the Alexandria High School legacy for the 2027 academic year.

Privacy First

Information is protected under the POPI Act. Data is utilized exclusively for official enrollment.

Time Frame

The registration process typically requires 15 minutes to complete the structural profiling.

Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

  39 |
  40 |     useEffect(() => {
> 41 |         fetchNews();
     |         ^^^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect
  42 |
  43 |         const channel = supabase
  44 |             .channel('smt-news')
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchNews'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchNews, filterStatus, searchQuery]
